metadata.name: rkpc_procedure_waypoint_turn_register
metadata.rule: Normal procedure route rows with Fly-over '-' are modeled as fly_by. HM holding rows with Fly-over 'Y' are not active route legs yet and will be modeled separately when holding/turn anticipation is implemented.

runway_modes.25: RWY25 procedures plus paired RWY31 SID display/logic
